name: Chile Relleno Torta
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375. Mix the grated cheeses and spread them evenly in a buttered 10-inch pie plate. Beat the eggs, add flour slowly, and beat in the half-and-half. If the mixture is lumpy, strain it. Pour the egg mixture over the cheeses in the pie plate. Carefully spoon the chiles over the surface, then spoon the picante sauce over all. Bake for about 45 minutes or until the center is set.
--Dying for Chocolate
Diane Mott Davidson
